title: alchemilla alpina var. subsericea
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. subsericea, also known as Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a low-growing perennial plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpina var. subsericea include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various skin conditions and promote overall health.
